items.title: Advanced Import Validation
items.notes: Advanced Import Validation completed. Implemented import job history, row validation, Word CSV/JSON import validation/run/rollback, import permissions, API endpoints, admin pages, migration, and integration tests. Limitations: detailed validation/run currently focused on Words; other import types can upload/store rows but need full validators/runners; UI upload uses pasted content; CSV parser is intentionally simple.

items.title: Review Advanced Import
items.notes: Review/harden completed. Locked import validation lifecycle, added upload safety checks for supported type, size, extension and JSON parse failures, expanded validation rules for category, tag, grammar, lesson, course, book and quiz previews, and added hardening integration tests. Build/test passed.

items.title: Documentation Advanced Import Validation Content Migration Tools
items.notes: Documentation completed for advanced import module, entities, API, security, admin UI, content migration operations, admin routes and v0.2.0 roadmap. Build/test passed.
